description: Local tier-classification and model-selection plugin for OpenClaw-configured providers
expectedBehaviors: Classifies prompts locally into SIMPLE, MEDIUM, COMPLEX, or REASONING tiers
Selects models from OpenClaw-configured provider model definitions
Constrains tier chains to configured and available provider model IDs
securityNotes: Model credentials and provider auth stay in OpenClaw provider configuration
Routing decisions are computed locally from prompt metadata and routing config
No additional wallet, payment, or proxy service is required by ClawHelm
